blocks.text: Arsenal humiliate Spurs 4-1 — Ødegaard delivers, five-point lead
Arsenal extend to 61 points, five clear of City. Liverpool's 1-0 at Forest keeps the hunt alive — but today belonged entirely to the Gunners and a clinical Ødegaard.

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League — Tue & Wed
items: ⚽ Tue 18:45 — Club Brugge at Atlético Madrid (agg. all square)
⚽ Wed 21:00 — AS Monaco at PSG (PSG lead 3-2, French derby)
